description:
Calculate the elongation velocity of the mitotic spindle during anaphase using the 'Mitosis' sample. Measure the pole-to-pole distance of the spindle (green/tubulin channel) at Frame 30 and Frame 45. Using the time interval between these frames, calculate the elongation velocity in µm/min. Save a maximum intensity projection of the green channel to ~/Fiji_Data/results/spindle/spindle_projection.tif. Create a text report at ~/Fiji_Data/results/spindle/velocity_report.txt with the following format:

Distance_F30: [Value] um
Distance_F45: [Value] um
Time_Delta: [Value] min
Velocity: [Value] um/min
